metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for apache-sedona==1.7.0

documentation: # Apache Sedona This library is the Python wrapper for Apache Sedona. Apache Sedona is a cluster computing system for processing large-scale spatial data. Apache Sedona extends Apache Spark / SparkSQL with a set of out-of-the-box Spatial Resilient Distributed Datasets (SRDDs)/ SpatialSQL that efficiently load, process, and analyze large-scale spatial data across machines. Please visit the official Apache Sedona website: https://sedona.apache.org/ Development environment setup docs: https://sedona.apache.org/latest-snapshot/setup/compile/#run-python-test
